summary: Iteration 10 testing complete - All 14 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: 1) Invoices 'جميع المشاريع' filter works for ALL users (not just admin), 2) Invoices does NOT auto-select first project, 3) Object Storage upload/download works, 4) HR Salaries month/year filters present, 5) HR salary deductions work, 6) Settings themes compact grid (grid-cols-8), 7) Personal theme API works, 8) GET /api/permissions returns correct structure, 9) Layout polling interval is 30 seconds.
critical_code_review_comments: Invoices.js line 463 correctly shows 'جميع المشاريع' for ALL users (removed 'isAdmin &&' condition)
Invoices.js line 82-84 useEffect is empty - does NOT auto-select first project for non-admin users
Layout.js line 274 has 30000ms polling interval (30 seconds)
Settings.js lines 372 and 510 have grid-cols-8 for compact theme display
HRManagement.js has monthFilter and yearFilter state with dropdowns on salaries tab
Object Storage POST /api/storage/upload returns file_id, storage_path, and size
Object Storage GET /api/storage/files/{path} downloads files correctly
PUT /api/settings/personal-theme works for setting and resetting personal theme
GET /api/permissions returns correct structure with invoices label='الفواتير والعهدة' and hr_management group='الموارد البشرية'
seed_data_creation: Test salary with deduction created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Invoices.js line 463 has {<option value=''>جميع المشاريع</option>} without isAdmin condition - available for ALL users. 2) Invoices.js useEffect at line 82-84 is empty (just a comment) - does NOT auto-select first project. 3) Layout.js polling interval is 30000ms (30 seconds). 4) Settings.js theme grids use grid-cols-8 for compact display. 5) HRManagement.js has monthFilter and yearFilter state with dropdowns visible only on salaries tab.

tests_performed.details: Returns correct structure with invoices label='الفواتير والعهدة', hr_management group='الموارد البشرية'
Sets and resets personal theme correctly
Returns salaries list with month/year fields
monthFilter and yearFilter state with dropdowns
